message:
fix(core): migrate tokio::test to runtime_compat in restore_process and telemetry (ft-e34d9.10.2.3.1)

Replace #[tokio::test] attributes with #[test] + run_async_test() helper
backed by runtime_compat::RuntimeBuilder in restore_process (7 tests) and
telemetry (1 test). Part of the bounded asupersync tokio callsite migration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
